name: the schema still accepts the legacy applies_to string-array form (backward compatible)
command:
printf 'id: g-test-axis
name: axis-rule
description: a rule for testing the 4-axis schema
detector: rubric/detectors/cloud-guidance-rule.sh
type: problem
fixable:
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: []
docs_url: https://e.com
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: P0
version: 1.0.0
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: warn-only
provenance:
- source: x
  url: https://e.com
  fetched_at: "2026-06-20T00:00:00Z"
applies_to: [typescript, react]
' > r.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-rubric-rule.sh" r.yaml && echo legacy-ok 1>&2
